twoFactor.title: Authentification ya makambo mibale

twoFactor.invalidCodeError: Code invalide. Nasengi yo omeka lisusu.

setup.subtitle: Tobongisa yo. Tosengi na yo opona type ya compte na yo mpo na kokoba.

setup.labDescription: Nazali kosala na laboratoire to na esika ya kosala ekzamɛ

messages.errorFallback: Naboyaki kotinda e-mail. Nasengi yo omeka lisusu.

validation.special: Ata moto moko oyo azali na bizaleli ya malamu
